zh.Welwick, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾維爾維其可
zh.lifeSummary: Lady Ann Thornton是Robert Thornton Jr和Margaret Thwenge的女兒，於大約1548年出生在英國越可爾牛頓。她於大約1571年與William Wright Esq.在英國越可爾牛頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1618年12月25日在英國越可爾普洛藍德享年71歲，埋葬在英國越可爾維爾維其可。

zh-hans.Welwick, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾維爾維其可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Ann Thornton是Robert Thornton Jr和Margaret Thwenge的女儿，于大约1548年出生在英国越可爾牛頓。她于大约1571年与William Wright Esq.在英国越可爾牛頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1618年12月25日在英国越可爾普洛藍德享年71岁，埋葬在英国越可爾維爾維其可。

nameMeanings.name: Thornton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England and Scotland so called, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The placename is most frequent in northern England, especially Yorkshire, where there are at least 16 possible sources for the surname.
Irish: Anglicized (translated) form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin ‘son of Sceachán’ (see Skehan ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Draighneáin ‘descendant of Draighneán’ (see Drennan ).

variants.name: Thornber
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the five minor places in Yorkshire called Thornber, particularly Thornber in Halton West. The placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn’ + beorg ‘hill, mound’.
Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thorton
meanings: English: probably a shortened form of   Thornton  , or a habitational name from Thorton in Marnhull, Dorset, which has the same origin.

variants.name: Skehan
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin or Ó Sceacháin ‘son (or descendant) of Sceachán’, a personal name probably based on a diminutive of sceach ‘briar, thorn bush’. The Gaelic name has sometimes been ‘translated’ as Thornton .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Lady Ann Thornton was born about 1548, in Newton, Yorkshire, England as the daughter of Robert Thornton Jr and Margaret Thwenge. She married William Wright Esq. about 1571, in Newton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 25 December 1618, in Plowland, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Welwick, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Ann Thornton est née environ 1548, à Newton, Everwyck, Angleterre, fille de Robert Thornton Jr et Margaret Thwenge. Elle a épousé William Wright Esq. environ 1571, à Newton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 25 décembre 1618, à Plowland, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Welwick, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Ann Thornton wurde um 1548 in Newton, Yorkshire, England, als Tochter von Robert Thornton Jr und Margaret Thwenge geboren. Sie hat um 1571 in Newton, Yorkshire, England William Wright Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 25. Dezember 1618 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Plowland, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Welwick, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Ann Thornton è nata il circa 1548 nel Newton, Yorkshire, England come figlia di Robert Thornton Jr e Margaret Thwenge. Lei sposato William Wright Esq. circa 1571, nel Newton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 dicembre 1618, nel Plowland, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Welwick, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Welwick, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアウエルウィック
ja.Plowland, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアプロウランド
ja.Newton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアニュートン
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Ann Thorntonは約1548年にイギリスヨークシュアイアニュートンでRobert Thornton JrとMargaret Thwengeの娘として生まれた。約1571年にイギリスヨークシュアイアニュートンでWilliam Wright Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1618年12月25日にイギリスヨークシュアイアプロウランドで71歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアウエルウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Ann Thornton(은)는 대략 1548년 영국 요르크실르 뉴턴에서 Robert Thornton Jr(와)과 Margaret Thwenge의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1571년 영국 요르크실르 뉴턴에서 William Wright Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1618년 12월 25일 영국 요르크실르 플로랜드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 웰윅에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Ann Thornton nasceu aproximadamente 1548, em Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filha de Robert Thornton Jr e Margaret Thwenge. Ela casou-se com William Wright Esq. aproximadamente 1571, em Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1618, em Plowland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Welwick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Ann Thornton родилась около 1548 г. в местности нютон, еркшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Robert Thornton Jr и Margaret Thwenge. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Wright Esq. около 1571 г. в местности нютон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 25 декабря 1618 г. в местности плоуланд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности велвикк, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Ann Thornton nació aproximadamente 1548, en Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hija de Robert Thornton Jr y Margaret Thwenge. Se casó con William Wright Esq. aproximadamente 1571, en Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1618, en Plowland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Welwick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
